meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Ship SaaS Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your build, validate faster, and finally launch your SaaS product.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'founder paralysis' by enforcing a modular, high-velocity architecture. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code, you transform high-level product requirements into production-ready features in minutes, drastically reducing your time-to-market while ensuring the technical foundation remains scalable and monetizable from day one.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the infinite loop of architectural indecision, the graveyard of half-finished repos, and the sinking feeling that your competitors are shipping while you’re still configuring boilerplate. The problem isn't your vision; it's the friction between your idea and the first deployed commit.

We are shifting the paradigm. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you move from 'coding' to 'architecting' at scale. This isn't just a starter kit; it's a battle-tested engine designed to bypass the common pitfalls that kill SaaS startups before they reach their first user.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade directory structure that separates core business logic from UI components to ensure future maintainability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity base template with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe integration enabled.

steps.title: Define Domain Models with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out your database schema to ensure your MVP is data-centric and optimized for rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a SaaS user management system including roles, subscriptions, and usage-based billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate a prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application'

steps.title: Automate Feature Injection
steps.description: Use the Antigravity CLI to push new feature modules into the existing architecture without breaking dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject an authentication module using Clerk into the /src/auth directory.

steps.title: Implement Revenue Logic
steps.description: Secure your monetization layer by integrating Stripe webhooks and subscription tiers directly into the Antigravity scaffold.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler that updates user subscription status in the database based on event types.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Write a Stripe webhook handler for subscription.updated events'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline by configuring automated deployments that mirror your production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline for Vercel deployment with automated testing triggers.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'feature-first' branch pattern; never commit directly to main to preserve your deployment stability.
Use Claude Code's context window to scan your entire codebase before asking for refactors to ensure type safety across modules.
Prioritize 'fake-door' validation by building the UI for a feature before writing the backend logic to confirm user demand.
Configure your Antigravity environment variables in a single .env.vault file to prevent credential leaks during rapid iteration.
Treat your logs as your primary debugging tool; use the built-in observability layer in Antigravity to track conversion drop-offs.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin your first round of user testing. Use the feedback loop to iterate on your core value proposition and scale your infrastructure via the Antigravity module library.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum. Your product deserves to reach users, and your time is the most valuable asset you have. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
